author: lOrm
content: Fixed in src/pipeline.rs: extracted pure classify_google_finish_reason() helper mapping Gemini finishReason. SAFETY/RECITATION/BLOCKLIST -> safety_blocked + AppEvent::ApiError + tracing::warn!; MAX_TOKENS -> length + warn; STOP -> stop; unknown values verbatim. Added GoogleFinishClassification struct and finish_reason: Option<String> field on TurnResult. 4 unit tests (issue_788_*) all pass. clippy --lib --tests exit 0.
